hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] 🔍 Review changes before push...');console.error('[Hook] Run: git diff --stat HEAD~1')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Reminder before git push to review changes

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/server\//.test(p)&&/\.(jsx|tsx|dart)$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Writing '+p.match(/\.(jsx|tsx|dart)$/)[0]+' file inside server/')}if(/client\//.test(p)&&/\.dart$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Writing .dart file inside client/')}if(/mobile\//.test(p)&&/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Writing .js/.ts file inside mobile/')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Detect cross-platform file writes (e.g. .dart in server/)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/server\//.test(p)&&/\.(jsx|tsx|dart)$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Editing '+p.match(/\.(jsx|tsx|dart)$/)[0]+' file inside server/')}if(/client\//.test(p)&&/\.dart$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Editing .dart file inside client/')}if(/mobile\//.test(p)&&/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] ⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM VIOLATION: Editing .js/.ts file inside mobile/')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Detect cross-platform file edits (e.g. .dart in server/)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const ns=i.tool_input?.new_string||'';if(/(api_key|secret|password|token)\s*[:=]\s*['\"][^'\"]{4,}['\"]/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] 🚨 SECURITY: Possible hardcoded secret detected in '+p)}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Detect hardcoded secrets in edited files
